flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southwestern University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.0k → $53.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southwestern University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.0k → $53.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Southwestern University rose 10% between 2006 and 2009 ($13.2k → $14.6k).
